text:
Once upon a harvest moon, there lived an owl named Owly.

Owly love reading. Every night she'd fly down to the ancient library deep within the oak woods.

There was just one reason Owly wouldnonom't borrow books. She couldn't read.

One day, Owly owl thought: Why can't I read like everyone else?

So she fluttered harder.

No, say owl.

Then she fluttered slower.

Something tickled her.

OOWLY?

That was just an old tortoise.

She chased him.

So slow!

Then she snatched him up.

OOWL!

But why?

Just reading.

She read forever.

She knew forever.


I'm owly.
Oh wow!

You know?

You know me.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
